SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT objid, skredrisikokvikkleireklasse, omrade FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlopomr WHERE skredrisikokvikkleireklasse = '5';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: spatial_join

1.description: lookup kommunenummer and geometry for Trondheim municipality

2.description: inspect distinct skredrisikokvikkleireklasse values in quick-clay layer

3.description: select quick-clay polygons with the chosen high-risk class (reduced by class only) for later spatial join

4.description: select parcels (teig) in Trondheim by kommunenummer

5.description: find parcels that intersect the high-risk quick-clay polygons

6.description: deduplicate to one row per teigid
